text.title: 30-Day Onboarding Phase Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the 30-Day Onboarding Phase methodology end-to-end.

step.name: check-preconditions
step.input: The "Applies If" + "Skip If" checklist from AGENTS.md.
step.action: Verify every Applies-If item holds AND no Skip-If item triggers. Stop if any check fails.
step.output: Boolean: methodology applies / does not apply.
step.decision-gate: If preconditions fail, emit a skip-record and STOP.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.action: Read each input, attach its path/URL to the working artefact. Refuse to proceed if any input is unreachable.

step.name: apply-rules
step.input: Inputs gathered + the rules from content/01-core-rules.xml.
step.action: Walk each rule; record per-rule pass/fail; for each fail capture the violating snippet.
step.decision-gate: If any HARD rule fails, repair the artefact or escalate; do not return a partially-conformant output.

step.name: produce-artefact
step.action: Fill the template under `templates/` according to the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

step.name: validate-and-handover
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-onboarding-30-day.py --file <path>`. Fix any reported violations. Send the validated artefact to the named owner.
step.output: Owner-signed artefact registered with the consumer.
